introSection: Jet Screw Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Asahikawa Zoo in Asahikawa, Hokkaido, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Blue track with white supports. The ride had a double corkscrew.

fullText:
Jet Screw Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Asahikawa Zoo in Asahikawa, Hokkaido, Japan.

Blue track with white supports. The ride had a double corkscrew.
